summary: First iteration end-to-end test of Ritchnygie Trading Lab (RTL) Phase 1. All 17 backend feature endpoints PASS via pytest (15/15 = 100%). Frontend dashboard, watchlist, news (with working filters) and calendar pages render correctly with live yfinance + FRED data. One spec mismatch: Header nav for /news uses label 'Intel' giving data-testid='nav-intel' instead of 'nav-news' as listed in the review_request.

minor.issue: Returns flat keys (atr, atr_pct, adx, adx_state, rsi, rsi_state). ATR has no categorical state field (only atr_pct numeric). Spec said 'ATR, ADX, RSI numeric values + states'. Consider adding atr_state (e.g., Low/Normal/High vol) for consistency.

Per-event field is named 'name' (not 'title'). risk_warning lives at response level, not per-event. Per-event status field is 'risk_now' (boolean). All values are valid; just confirm naming with frontend consumer.

ui_bugs.issue: Nav link to /news has label 'Intel' so data-testid resolves to 'nav-intel'. Review_request expected 'nav-news'. Either change label to 'News' or update tests/spec to use 'nav-intel'.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add atr_state to /api/indicators response for parity with adx_state/rsi_state.
OPTIONAL: Either rename Intel nav label to 'News' OR document data-testid='nav-intel' as the canonical selector for the /news route.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses os.environ['MONGO_URL'] / DB_NAME (good — fails fast on missing config).
All backend routes correctly prefixed under /api router.
CORS configured permissively via CORS_ORIGINS env (acceptable for dev).
yfinance + FRED only — no API keys required, matches stated free-tier constraint.
Frontend uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL via /lib/api.js — no hardcoded URLs detected.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all observable flows worked; only minor testid-label naming note)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_rtl_api.py covers all 17 endpoints in scope — re-run with `python -m pytest backend/tests/test_rtl_api.py -v`. Frontend Playwright flows verified: dashboard hero (S&P 500 CFD / FundedNext), Mag7 heatmap (7 tiles), Regime card (Trending+Mixed with ADX/VIX/RiskComposite signals), London Session, FRED macro panel (5 series), Indicators, Economic Calendar (CPI/PPI/Retail/NFP/FOMC), News feed with working institutional/tech/macro filters. Only spec mismatch is the Intel/News nav label — confirm with main agent which is canonical before changing.
